items.title: container
items.description: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.
items.description_zh: 一种在 Mac 上使用轻量级虚拟机创建和运行 Linux 容器的工具。它是用 Swift 编写的，并针对 Apple 芯片进行了优化。

items.description_zh: PM 技能市场：100 多种代理技能、命令和插件 - 从发现到策略、执行、启动和增长。

items.title: SkillSpector
items.description: Security scanner for AI agent skills. Detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks.
items.description_zh: AI 代理技能的安全扫描器。检测漏洞、恶意模式和安全风险。

items.title: system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools
items.description: FULL Augment Code, Claude Code, Cluely, CodeBuddy, Comet, Cursor, Devin AI, Junie, Kiro, Leap.new, Lovable, Manus, NotionAI, Orchids.app, Perplexity, Poke, Qoder, Replit, Same.dev, Trae, Traycer AI, VSCode Agent, Warp.dev, Windsurf, Xcode, Z.ai Code, Dia & v0. (And other Open Sourced) System Prompts, Internal Tools & AI Models

items.title: restic
items.description_zh: 快速、安全、高效的备份程序

items.title: agency-agents
items.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
items.description_zh: 触手可及的完整人工智能机构 - 从前端向导到 Reddit 社区忍者，从奇思妙想的注入者到现实检查者。每个代理都是一位具有个性、流程和经过验证的可交付成果的专业专家。

items.title: MasterDnsVPN
items.description: Advanced DNS tunneling VPN for censorship bypass, optimized beyond DNSTT and SlipStream with low-overhead ARQ, resolver load balancing, high packet-loss stability and speed.
items.description_zh: 用于绕过审查的高级 DNS 隧道 VPN，经过优化，超越 DNSTT 和 SlipStream，具有低开销 ARQ、解析器负载平衡、高丢包稳定性和速度。

items.title: chatwoot
items.description: Open-source live-chat, email support, omni-channel desk. An alternative to Intercom, Zendesk, Salesforce Service Cloud etc. 🔥💬
items.description_zh: 开源实时聊天、电子邮件支持、全渠道服务台。 Intercom、Zendesk、Salesforce Service Cloud 等的替代品。🔥💬

items.title: agentsview
items.description: Local-first session intelligence and analytics for coding agents, supporting Claude Code, Codex, and more than 20 other agents. Also: 100x faster replacement for ccusage!
items.description_zh: 针对编码代理的本地优先会话智能和分析，支持 Claude Code、Codex 和 20 多个其他代理。另外：替换 ccusage 的速度加快 100 倍！
